title: Ms. Judy
bodyText:
**The lady at the end of the cave.** Near-7ft elderly elf(-looking) woman, thick green braids, trinket-covered, tree snake + tiny owl. Lives in a wooden house in a vast quiet cavern past the Stonemason district. Blunt, profane, warm — and once a monster.

# Current truth
- Ally of the party. Brewed the **concentrate** buying [[koviz]] time; scouting [[the-underdark|the Underdark]] through her **meat-wall** transport. Suspects [[root-darkpass|Root]]'s digs unleashed the vines. Portrait: art/judy.png
- Was a **hag of a three-sister coven** (poisoned wells, cursed children, ritual absorption of creatures). A **radiant figure slew her sisters, spared her, whispered something** — she's spent the decades since underground doing "a few thousand good deeds." Helps only *friends* — friendship established by her **blood-bowl ritual** (mutual seeing).
- Old, close, secret friendship with **[[pc-brolin|Brolin]]** (trinkets for trinkets). Supplies **Javier Spells** with (conjured?) human flesh — a standing deal.
- She recognized something in **[[pc-eddy|Eddy]]** during the ritual (fear + fury flash) and told [[pc-varen|Varen]]: "I know what you have... the dark lady is trying to find you. Each of her legs is coming for you."

> [!dm] Power source: she once drew power from **Myrkul** (dead/displaced god of death) — the S14 prep ties her to the gods' power shift (Kelemvor?). The radiant figure who slew the coven: unrevealed — plausibly connected to [[lathander]] or [[eilistraee]]. Decide before it matters.

# Since the party's return (S16+)
The Stonemasons' rumor campaign has **blamed her for the sickness**: her cavern trees burnt, watchful eyes destroyed, **"Be gone or be burnt"** charred above her door. She's still helping — rituals for the newcomers, Eddy's solo [[shipton]] reading, a **self-destructing warning owl** (S23) — but Koviz is turning on her exactly as Root's contingency intended, even with Root dead.
